mutations.name: Carnival
mutations.effect: 9.5x — rarest and strongest mutation in the game

pets.name: T-Rex
pets.recommendation: Best used in late-game with Outer Ring. Pair with high-tier seeds for maximum mutation stacking.

pets.name: Starfall Griffin
pets.bonus: 10x–11x income — applies Starfall mutation (only stackable mutation)
pets.recommendation: Priority S-tier pet. Starfall is the strongest stackable mutation. Use during cosmic event windows for leaderboard pushes.

pets.name: Hydra
pets.recommendation: Excellent long-session pet. The mutation upgrade scales well with Outer Ring 19x. Best for extended farming sessions.

pets.name: Claw Machine Kraken
pets.recommendation: Dual-purpose S-tier. The seed luck bonus helps chase rare seeds while 11x base multiplier drives profit.

pets.name: Harvest Drone
pets.recommendation: Priority for leaderboard push. Reduces manual harvest loss.

pets.name: Rain Cloud
pets.recommendation: Valuable at all stages. Increases earnings stability.

pets.name: Kitsune
pets.recommendation: Fast mutation upgrade cycle. Good for mid-game players pushing toward late ring content.

pets.name: Velociraptor
pets.recommendation: Time skip utility makes this valuable for progression. The income multiplier scales well with Middle Ring.

pets.name: Red Panda
pets.recommendation: Strong A-tier income pet with passive plant level upgrades. Good bridge between mid and endgame.

pets.name: Popcorn Phoenix
pets.recommendation: Pet Treat utility is valuable for pet leveling strategies. Decent income multiplier.

pets.name: Rhino
pets.bonus: 10x income — all floors +25% growth speed every 300s for 60s
pets.recommendation: Growth speed boost benefits the entire farm. Useful during long farming sessions with multiple rings.

pets.name: Disco Dodo
pets.recommendation: Prismatic Fertilizer generation helps sustain mutation cycles. Moderate income tier.

pets.name: Seed Planter
pets.recommendation: Mid-game value increases as plots expand.

pets.name: Sprinkler Bot
pets.recommendation: Pairs well with high-value seeds and Wet/Frozen routes.

pets.name: Capybara
pets.bonus: Boosts seed luck for rare seed rolls
pets.recommendation: Valuable mid-game pet for players hunting Transcended seeds. Pairs with seed rolling strategies.

pets.name: Spinosaurus
pets.recommendation: Pet Treat every 10 minutes adds utility. Decent B-tier income for mid-game progression.

pets.name: Prizewheel Peacock
pets.recommendation: Cooldown reduction helps with pet ability uptime. Solid B-tier for support-focused builds.

pets.name: Gummy Gator
pets.recommendation: Prismatic Fertilizer generation at 20% chance. Lower proc rate than Disco Dodo but still useful.

pets.name: Jackpot Slime
pets.recommendation: 2x harvest burst window is potent. Time the burst with Outer Ring for maximum spike profits.

pets.name: Token Toad
pets.recommendation: Highest base income among B-tier mutation pets. The longer cooldown is offset by strong baseline multiplier.

pets.name: Bumper Snail
pets.recommendation: Sell premium passive is subtle but stacks with ring multipliers. Good for long-duration farming.

pets.name: Captain Puffer
pets.recommendation: Auto-advances plant growth stages. Useful when combined with auto-harvesters for partial automation.

pets.name: Mammoth
pets.recommendation: Long upgrade cycle but meaningful mutation scaling. Better suited for extended sessions over quick harvests.

pets.name: Gallimimus
pets.recommendation: Fast full-grow cycle at 25% chance. Good for early Outer Ring setups before full automation.

pets.name: Triceratops
pets.recommendation: Pet Treat every 5 minutes is consistent utility. Decent B-tier option for pet leveling strategies.

pets.name: Fertilizer Cat
pets.recommendation: Use when resources are limited. Replace later.

pets.name: Market Dog
pets.recommendation: Good for pre-automation players.

pets.name: Polar Bear
pets.recommendation: Full grow passive helps in early mid-game. Decent C-tier for players without better options.

pets.name: Lion
pets.recommendation: Super Fertilizer at 10% is low proc. The income multiplier is also on the lower end for C-tier.

pets.name: Crocodile
pets.recommendation: Fast full-grow cycle but low proc rate. Early-game support pet for players without automation.

pets.name: Gorilla
pets.recommendation: Long cooldown on strong fertilizer. Low-tier pet best replaced once better options become available.

pets.name: Basic Helper
pets.recommendation: Only use when no better pet is available.

pets.name: Slow Snail
pets.recommendation: Low priority. Don't invest resources.
